drivers.name: e1000
drivers.description: Intel e1000/e1000e Gigabit Ethernet — PCIe NIC with MMIO BAR, interrupt coalescing, multi-queue TX/RX ring buffers, hardware checksum offload. Supports 82574L, 82579LM, I217/I218/I219.

drivers.name: virtio_blk
drivers.description: VirtIO block device driver — virtqueue-based split/packed ring I/O, supports read/write/flush, MMIO and PCI transport, used by QEMU, KVM, cloud hypervisors. Multi-architecture support.

drivers.name: virtio_blk
drivers.description: VirtIO block device driver — virtqueue-based split/packed ring I/O, supports read/write/flush, MMIO and PCI transport, used by QEMU, KVM, cloud hypervisors. Multi-architecture support.

drivers.name: virtio_blk
drivers.description: VirtIO block device driver — virtqueue-based split/packed ring I/O, supports read/write/flush, MMIO and PCI transport, used by QEMU, KVM, cloud hypervisors. Multi-architecture support.

drivers.name: virtio_net
drivers.description: VirtIO network device driver — virtqueue TX/RX, MAC address configuration, link status notification, checksum offload, multi-queue support. Used by all major hypervisors.

drivers.name: virtio_net
drivers.description: VirtIO network device driver — virtqueue TX/RX, MAC address configuration, link status notification, checksum offload, multi-queue support. Used by all major hypervisors.

drivers.name: virtio_net
drivers.description: VirtIO network device driver — virtqueue TX/RX, MAC address configuration, link status notification, checksum offload, multi-queue support. Used by all major hypervisors.

drivers.name: nvme
drivers.description: NVM Express 1.4 storage driver — PCIe submission/completion queue pairs, PRP-based DMA scatter/gather, namespace management, interrupt coalescing, 64-bit BAR MMIO. Supports Samsung, Intel, WD NVMe SSDs and QEMU NVMe emulation.

drivers.name: ahci
drivers.description: AHCI 1.3.1 SATA host controller driver — FIS-based command interface, port multiplier support, NCQ (native command queuing), hot-plug detection, ATAPI support. Covers Intel ICH/PCH AHCI controllers and QEMU AHCI emulation.

drivers.name: qemu_vga
drivers.description: QEMU Standard VGA (Bochs VBE) display driver
